categories.description: A marketing provider (Meta / Google Ads / etc.) has been marked unreachable after N consecutive failures. Conversion tracking is paused until the breaker auto-resets or ops manually resets it. Includes provider name, last error, open-until timestamp, and reset instructions.

A conversion event exhausted its retry budget or failed permanently against a marketing provider. Every fire is a paid-conversion loss — the tenant should replay or investigate. Includes event type, subject, revenue amount, provider, and final error.

A test dispatch to a provider (during tenant onboarding or after credential rotation) failed. Signals mis-configured credentials, wrong pixel_id, or invalid webhook_url. Includes provider name, error, and troubleshooting steps.
Your monthly Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) report is available. Includes campaign-level revenue attribution, cost/value ratio, and top-performing campaigns. Enterprise-only.

The rate of consent-suppressed marketing events has spiked above baseline. May indicate a consent-collection bug (users being erroneously marked opted-out) or a compliance change. Includes the spike ratio + affected event types.
More than 10% of marketing events are failing over a 15-minute window. Likely provider-side issue or credential expiry. Includes the failure ratio, top failing providers, and top error codes.

A marketing provider config (credentials, enabled event types, test mode) was edited. Audit-trail notification — the tenant admin should confirm they made the change. Includes provider name, changed fields, and actor.
